filename: 18.02.25 GeoMx Plan - Zhihan Ada Iga Aleksandra.md
relative_path: 4. Meetings & Updates/Meeting_notes/2025/18.02.25 GeoMx Plan - Zhihan Ada Iga Aleksandra.md
full_text:
Monday - Prep 3-4h 2 samples 1 slide

Tuesday - Staining and ROI selection

Wednesday - Prep 3-4h 4 samples 2 slides

Thursday - Staining and ROI selection

Friday - Library preparation together

2025

Monday - Baking overnight 37℃

Tuesday -- Check ROIs together for this week, Prep 4h: 8 samples, 4
slides

Wednesday - Prep + staining 3h (8 samples), scanning and ROI selection -
4 samples, 2 slides

Thursday - Scanning and ROI selection - 4 samples, 2 slides

Friday - Library preparation together

**DAY 1**

**12:45-13:45 baking**

**13:45-14:20 deparaffinization**

**14:20-14:50 target retrieval/ steamer**

**14:50-15:10 Expose RNA targets/ Proteinase K digestion**

**15:10-15:30 Postfix**

**15:30-16:00 In situ hybridization**

DAY 2

09:00 - 09:30 Warm to 37℃

09:45 - 10:45 Stringent Wash

10:45 - 11:15 Blocking with Buffer W

11:15 - 12:15 Staining

12:45 - 13:30 Scanning

13:30 - 15:00 ROI selection

15:00 - 15:45 Segmentation

15:45 - 16:45 Sample collection

DAY 3

10:15-10:45 Dry down and rehydrate the samples

10:45-11:15 Load PCR plates (primer, collection, master mix)

11:15-13:00 PCR running

13:00-13:20 Pooling

13:20-15:00 AMPure beads cleanup

Day 4

Library quality control (Tapestation) in FuGu
